title: elsholtzia cyprianii var. longipilosa
intro: Elsholtzia cyprianii var. longipilosa is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family, commonly known as Vietnamese mint or long-pilose elsholtzia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Elsholtzia cyprianii var. longipilosa is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
